categories.name: Generation and Testing
categories.description: Studies that generated new instances and tested whether patterns appeared

categories.name: Classification and Categorization
categories.description: Studies that classified or categorized existing data into groups

categories.name: Variation and Measurement
categories.description: Studies that varied a parameter and measured the effect on outcomes

categories.name: Comparison and Reinterpretation
categories.description: Studies that compared multiple descriptions or reinterpreted existing data

categories.name: Removal and Degradation Testing
categories.description: Studies that removed components or degraded conditions to test robustness
